title: PVP Pro
description: A client-side modpack made for popular PvP servers, such as PvP Legacy
body:
#  DISCLAIMER
This is not meant to be installed on the server this is FULLY CLIENT SIDE. I know it may seem like it is meant to be installed on a server, but this CLIENT SIDE modpack is targeted for users to use while playing on  a pvp server.

# PVP Pro Mod Pack: Enhance Your PvP Experience!

**Overview:**
PVP Pro is your ultimate companion for dominating PvP servers like PvP Legacy and CubeCraft FFA. This carefully curated mod pack combines performance optimizations, visual enhancements, and essential utilities to elevate your PvP gameplay.

## Key Features:

1. **Optimized Performance:** Enhancements with Sodium, Lithium, and Indium reduce lag and boost FPS, ensuring a smooth PvP experience.
2. **Enhanced Visuals:** BSL Shaders and Iris Shaders provide stunning graphics with minimal performance impact.
3. **Improved HUD:** BetterF3, AppleSkin and AxolotlClient offer more detailed and customizable heads up displays.
4. **Advanced Combat Feedback:** AxolotlClient and BetterHurtCam enhance combat feedback and immersion.
5. **Seamless Gameplay:** Borderless Mining and Continuity improve multitasking efficiency and visual cohesion.

<details>
  <summary>Why install PvP Pro?</summary>
PVP Pro is designed for players who want to excel in PvP environments. Whether you’re a seasoned fighter or a new challenger, this mod pack ensures you have the tools and enhancements needed to compete at your best. From improved performance and visuals to advanced configuration options, PVP Pro enhances every aspect of your PvP experience.
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Embedded Mods</summary>

- **3D Skin Layers:** by tr7zw, Version 1.6.6
- **Adaptive Tooltips:** by isxander, Version 1.3.0

## Known Issues  
 - Singleplayer worlds crashing (Don't know why, if you figure it out please let me know in the issue tracker)
- Servers crashing on first load (Don't know why, try joining the server again to fix)
